'''ngahana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnoiditis|arachnoiditis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnoiditis|arachnoiditis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngahana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ngæhænæth || ngæhænæj || ngæhænæsh || ngæhænæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ngahahanath || ngahahanaj || ngahahanash || ngahahana
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ngahanath || ngahanaj || ngahanash || ngahana
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ngahafnafth || ngahafnafj || ngahafnafsh || ngahafnaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngahanatha || ngahanaja || ngahanasha || ngahanaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngahanath || ngahanaj || ngahanash || ngahana
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngahanathal || ngahanajal || ngahanashal || ngahanakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngahanaathatha || ngahanaajaja || ngahanaashasha || ngahanaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngahanathan || ngahanajan || ngahanashan || ngahanakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngahanathaoro || ngahanajaoro || ngahanashaoro || ngahanakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
